items.title: With Possible Iran Strike Looming, U.S. Says Staff Can Leave Israel, and Urges Speed
items.description: In an email to embassy workers Friday morning, Ambassador Mike Huckabee warned them that if they wanted to leave Israel, they “should do so TODAY.”

items.title: Green Party Defeats Labour in U.K. Special Election, in Blow to Starmer

items.title: Amid Rhetoric About Rupture With U.S., Finland Urges Calm
items.description: “We don’t need a bulldozer,” says Alexander Stubb, Finland’s president and a golf partner of President Trump. “Reform doesn’t mean destruction.”
